creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
- Mark audio/gstreamer-plugins-musicbrainz DEPRECATED as audio/libmusicbrainz
  is deprecated.  The MusicBrainz RDF webservice is no longer functional.
- Set EXPIRATION_DATE to one month from now since audio/libmusicbrainz is
  non-functional.
- Once this slave port is removed, musicbrainz can be removed from the 
  gstreamer framework.

How-To-Repeat: - Use attached diff
